title: stevia obovata
intro: Stevia obovata, also known as Stevia ovata, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a type of Stevia plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Stevia obovata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve oral health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as diabetes and obesity. Stevia obovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
